notes: Resolved tokens are flat var() expressions or computed colour values, mirroring the CSS injected at runtime.
Surface-context remapping ([data-surface=…] blocks) is intentionally omitted; consumers should re-derive per-context values from the same brand inputs.

material.--Material-Metallic-Silver-Fill: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-Shadow) 0%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-Base) 15%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-BaseLight) 30%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-Highlight) 45%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-BaseLight) 55%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-Base) 70%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-BaseLight) 85%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-Shadow) 100%)
material.--Material-Metallic-Silver-Stroke: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-BaseDark) 0%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-Highlight) 18%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-Base) 38%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-BaseLight) 62%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-Shadow) 82%, var(--Material-Metallic-Silver-BaseDark) 100%)

material.--Material-Metallic-Gold-Stroke: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--Material-Metallic-Gold-BaseDark) 0%, var(--Material-Metallic-Gold-Highlight) 18%, var(--Material-Metallic-Gold-Base) 38%, var(--Material-Metallic-Gold-BaseLight) 62%, var(--Material-Metallic-Gold-Shadow) 82%, var(--Material-Metallic-Gold-BaseDark) 100%)
